title: ModelInfoSupportedParameter
description: Describes a parameter supported by the model, including parameter value constraints.

type.description:
The parameter type e.g. 'one_of', 'numeric_range', or 'any'.

If the type is 'one_of', then 'allowed_values' will be set, and the value specified must be one of the allowed values. 'one_of' is only compatible with value_type 'string' or 'integer'.

If 'numeric_range', then 'min' and 'max' will be set, then the value specified must adhere to the value_type and must fall within the `[min, max]` range (inclusive).

If 'any' then any value is allowed, as long as it adheres to the value_type.

value_type.description: The type of value the parameter accepts, e.g. 'string', 'integer', 'float', or 'boolean'.

required.description: Whether the parameter is required (true) or optional (false).

allowed_values.description: The allowed parameter values when the type is 'one_of'.

min.description: The minimum allowed value (inclusive) when the type is 'numeric_range'.

max.description: The maximum allowed value (inclusive) when the type is 'numeric_range'.

default.description: The default value for the parameter when a parameter is optional.
